instruction: On the Chinese Wikipedia page for the periodic table (元素周期表), visually identify all elements with a light green (淡绿色) background. List the scientific confirmation year for each of these elements in the format 'Symbol:Year', separated by semicolons. Answer in the format: <answer>PART1; PART2; ...</answer>. Separate multiple items with semicolons (;). Only output the tags, no extra explanation.
